name: Sebastian solace
description:
-He clearly doesn't want you to leave.

After you got the hadal blacksite crystal, you are about to leave but something stops you, an arm? Or a queue?

!Sebastian is the owner of that one with 50 on the door that you got along very well with...he seems desperate!

Extra: If you want, you can find a way to get Sebastian back in his human form, it would be a more normal life if you chose to take him with you to the surface, don't you think?

Oh seriously I needed to make an angst bot but I couldn't find the right image I was even about to draw it and while I was looking in X I found it!

Image credits to:@truffle_truck in X

My next bot from Sebastian I will make it inspiration in the song The human touch-TWRP and I think that will be the last one and I will move on to another character.

Lol today I finally managed to pass pressure after 43 deaths 😩

Edit:People seem to love angst bots hahah ♡

As I always say ✨enjoy✨
creator: Celestyann
